sections.heading: Source
sections.content: The provided source text is the NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology for Testicular Cancer, Version 2.2026.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.content: This document does not contain a definition for Soft Tissue Sarcoma. The source exclusively covers testicular germ cell tumors, including seminoma and nonseminoma subtypes, their diagnosis, staging, and treatment.
